ABOUT.TITLE: Intelligent automation, made in Costa Rica
ABOUT.P1: We are Vectis: an engineering team in San José, Costa Rica, building software, automation and AI for clients all over the world. “Vectis” means lever in Latin — and that is what we do: with a well-built system, a small company performs like a big one.
ABOUT.P2: We build the “invisible employee”: custom systems that connect to the tools you already use and handle repetitive work on their own, tirelessly, around the clock. We don’t sell off-the-shelf software — we build it for you and leave it running.
ABOUT.P3: Our philosophy: diagnosis before prescription. First we understand your real problem, then we build. Reliable, measurable technology designed to give back your most expensive resource: time.

PRECISION.TITLE: Precision
PRECISION.DESC: Every line of code has a clear purpose.

FAQ.TITLE: Frequently asked questions
FAQ.SUBTITLE: Everything you need to know before working with us.

Q1.A: We build custom software, websites and web apps, mobile apps, automations and artificial intelligence, plus integrations, APIs and data & analytics solutions. With particular strength in automating repetitive administrative processes.

Q2.Q: Which technologies do you specialize in?
Q2.A: We work with Angular, React, Next.js and Node across frontend and backend; Python and LLMs (OpenAI, Claude) for AI; and cloud such as AWS. We pick the stack based on each project's goal.

Q3.Q: Do you work with clients outside Costa Rica?
Q3.A: Yes. We're based in San José, Costa Rica, but we work with clients all over the world, remotely and across time zones.

Q4.Q: How long does a project take?
Q4.A: Our automation systems are up and running in about 2 weeks: days 1–3 diagnosis, 4–10 build and integration, and 11–14 testing with real data and go-live. Larger projects ship in phases.

Q5.A: Diagnosis → Design → Build → Ongoing support. We start by understanding your real problem before proposing a solution, with iterative delivery and frequent demos so you see real progress.

Q6.Q: How much does it cost and how do you charge?
Q6.A: We offer fixed-scope projects or dedicated monthly teams (staff augmentation). After an intro call we send a proposal with pricing and timeline.

Q7.Q: Do you offer support and maintenance?
Q7.A: Yes. We provide ongoing support, monitoring and evolutive maintenance so your product keeps running and improving after launch.

Q8.Q: Can you integrate with our current tools?
Q8.A: Absolutely. We build integrations and pipelines with your systems, CRMs, ERPs and third-party services via APIs and webhooks.

Q9.Q: Do you work with startups and large companies?
Q9.A: Both. We support startups from MVP and established companies on products at scale, adapting the team and process to each case.

Q10.Q: How do we start working together?
Q10.A: Easy: book a call or message us from the Contact section. We'll talk through your idea and propose the next steps.

PRIVACY.META_DESC: How Vectis Automation Group collects, uses and protects your personal information.
PRIVACY.TITLE: Privacy Policy
PRIVACY.INTRO: At Vectis Automation Group we respect your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect through our website, our forms and our AI ChatBot product, and how we use and protect it.

S1.B: Vectis Automation Group, based in San José, Costa Rica. For any question about your data, write to us at contact@wearevectis.com.

S2.B: We collect the information you voluntarily provide through our contact, appointment and newsletter forms. This may include: name, email, company, subject, estimated budget and the message you send us. We do not collect sensitive data.

S3.H: Use of your email and form information
S3.B: We may use your email and the information you submit through our forms to: respond to your request, contact you, schedule meetings or appointments, prepare proposals, and send you communications and information related to our services. By submitting a form, you agree that we may use that data for these purposes.

S4.B: If you subscribe to our newsletter, we will use your email to send you news, content and updates. You can unsubscribe at any time using the opt-out link or by writing to contact@wearevectis.com.

S5.B: We keep your information only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described, or while we maintain a relationship with you, unless the law requires a different period.

S6.B: We do not sell or rent your information. We only share it with trusted providers that help us operate the site and communicate with you (for example, email or hosting services), always under confidentiality obligations.

S7.B: The site may use cookies or similar technologies to work properly and, if enabled, to measure usage anonymously. You can control cookies from your browser settings. If we add analytics or marketing tools, we will display a consent notice.

S8.B: You can request access, correction or deletion of your personal data, as well as object to its processing, by writing to contact@wearevectis.com. We will handle your request in accordance with applicable law.

S9.B: We may update this policy from time to time. We will post the current version on this page with its update date.

PRIVACY.CONTACT_LINE: Questions about your privacy? Write to us at

S10.H: AI ChatBot product: data we process
S10.B: When you subscribe to our AI ChatBot product and install it on your site, we process: (a) the configuration you define (business name, description, hours, catalog, FAQs and rules); (b) the conversations between the assistant and your site's visitors (messages sent and responses generated); (c) the contact details visitors choose to share, such as name, email or phone for lead capture; and (d) basic technical data needed to run the service, such as session identifiers and aggregated usage metrics.

S11.H: Roles: when we act as a data processor
S11.B: With respect to your site visitors' data, you (our customer) are the data controller and we act as the processor. We process that data solely to provide you the service and following your reasonable instructions. You are responsible for informing your visitors about the use of the chatbot and for having the legal basis or consent needed to collect their data.

S12.B: To operate the AI ChatBot we rely on cloud infrastructure and artificial-intelligence model providers that process data on our behalf under confidentiality and data-protection agreements. These providers process messages solely to generate responses and maintain the service. We do not sell your data and we do not use the content of your conversations for advertising.

S13.H: Security and retention of chatbot data
S13.B: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect information, such as encryption in transit, access control and per-customer data isolation. We retain conversations and leads while your account is active or as long as you need them, and we delete or anonymize them when they are no longer needed or when you close your account, unless a legal obligation requires us to keep them.

S14.H: Your choices and your visitors' choices
S14.B: You can request the export or deletion of the data associated with your chatbot by contacting us. Your site visitors may exercise their rights with you as the data controller; we will help you handle those requests as far as it concerns us as a processor. For details about your subscription and billing, see our Terms and our Refund Policy.

TERMS.META_DESC: Terms and conditions for using the website and services of Vectis Automation Group.
TERMS.TITLE: Terms & Conditions
TERMS.INTRO: These terms and conditions govern the use of the Vectis Automation Group website, requests for our services and the subscription to our AI ChatBot product. By using the site, submitting a form or creating an account, you accept these terms.

S1.B: By accessing and using this website you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the site.

S2.B: You agree to use the site lawfully and not to take any action that could damage it, disrupt its operation or infringe the rights of third parties.

S3.B: Information on the site is informational and does not constitute a binding offer. Services are governed by the specific proposals or contracts we agree in writing with each client.

S4.B: By submitting a contact, appointment or subscription form, you confirm the information provided is accurate and agree that Vectis may contact you to follow up on your request. Processing of your data is governed by our Privacy Policy.

S5.B: The site content (text, design, logo and the Vectis brand) is owned by Vectis Automation Group or its licensors. It may not be reproduced or used without prior authorization.

S6.B: The site may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

S7.B: The site is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, Vectis shall not be liable for indirect or consequential damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, the site.

S8.B: We may update these terms at any time. The current version will be posted on this page with its update date.

S9.B: These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Costa Rica, without prejudice to any applicable consumer protection rules.

TERMS.CONTACT_LINE: Questions about these terms? Write to us at

S10.B: In addition to the site, we offer AI ChatBot, an AI-powered conversational assistant that you can configure and install on your own website using a code snippet. The service is provided 'as is' and may evolve over time with new features or adjustments.

S11.B: To use the AI ChatBot you must create an account with accurate information and keep your credentials confidential. You are responsible for all activity carried out from your account. You must be of legal age and have the legal capacity to contract.

S12.B: The service is offered as a monthly subscription according to the chosen plan (Basic, Pro or Business). The price and limits of each plan are shown on the product page. Subscriptions renew automatically each period until you cancel. You may cancel at any time; cancellation stops the next renewal and the service continues until the end of the period already paid for.

S13.B: Refunds are governed by our Refund Policy, which forms part of these terms. We recommend reviewing it before subscribing to understand the initial guarantee, cancellations and applicable exceptions.

S14.B: You agree not to use the AI ChatBot for: illegal activities, fraud or impersonation; collecting sensitive data without a legal basis; generating content that infringes third-party rights or that is defamatory, hateful, violent, deceptive or that sexualizes minors; circumventing service limits; or attempting to manipulate the assistant to operate outside the service rules and restrictions. We review configurations in an automated way to prevent abuse and may limit, suspend or close accounts that breach this clause.

S15.H: Content and responsibility for the assistant
S15.B: You are responsible for the information you configure your chatbot with (catalog, prices, hours and policies) and for its accuracy. The assistant generates automated responses that may contain errors and do not replace professional advice. You must review and, where appropriate, supervise the interactions with your customers.

S16.B: We aim for high availability, but the service may experience interruptions due to maintenance or causes beyond our control. We apply per-plan usage limits to ensure a stable service for everyone. We may change features, limits or prices with reasonable prior notice; price changes apply from the next period.

S17.B: You may cancel your account whenever you want. We may suspend or terminate the service if you breach these terms, if there is a security risk or due to a legal requirement. After termination, we will stop processing the data associated with your chatbot and delete or anonymize it in accordance with our Privacy Policy.

PROMO.TITLE: An AI chatbot for your business
PROMO.SUBTITLE: Support, sell and capture customers 24/7 on your website. Install it with one line of code, no coding.
PROMO.B1: Answers questions and recommends products instantly
PROMO.B3: Learns from your business info and documentation
PROMO.MOCK_BOT1: Hi! 👋 How can I help you today?
PROMO.MOCK_BOT2: Yes, nationwide in 2-5 days. Free over $50!
PROMO.SUBTITLE2: You set it up once with your business information and it handles the rest: it serves, replies and converts while you focus on what matters.
PROMO.B4: Captures details from interested customers and hands them to you ready for follow-up.
PROMO.B5: Learns from your catalog and your business's questions to answer accurately.
PROMO.NOTE: Integrates with your site in minutes. No contracts, no hassle — cancel whenever you want.
PROMO.CAP1_D: Recommends products, answers questions and guides the customer to purchase.
PROMO.CAP2_D: Replies instantly at any hour, with no queues or waiting times.
PROMO.CAP3_D: Identifies interested customers and saves their details for your team.
PROMO.CAP4_T: Make the most of your time
PROMO.CAP4_D: The assistant handles replying to messages, scheduling, guiding customers, capturing leads and insights, and showing your inventory — you focus on the rest.
PROMO.STEPS_SUB: You are in full control from a simple panel. No developers, no waiting.
PROMO.STEP1_D: Sign up with email or Google and pick a plan. Takes under a minute.
PROMO.STEP2_D: Add your business info, hours, contact, FAQs, inventory and documents. Customize colors, logo and messages from the panel.
PROMO.STEP3_D: Copy one line of code and paste it on your website. The chat bubble appears instantly.
PROMO.B6: Human handoff: pass the conversation to a person when needed (via Telegram; more channels soon).

CONFIGURE.WIDGET_SUBTITLE: This is the code for your «{{company}}» chatbot. Paste it on your site to enable it, or copy it again whenever you need.
CONFIGURE.EDIT_SUBTITLE: Update your chatbot's information and save your changes. Your widget (the code) stays the same.
CONFIGURE.DELETE_BODY: «{{company}}» will be deleted and will stop working on your site. This action cannot be undone.
CONFIGURE.PAUSED: This ChatBot is paused: you cancelled your subscription and it won't respond on your site until you reactivate it.
CONFIGURE.INACTIVE_BOT: This ChatBot is inactive and won't respond on your site.

ONBOARD.TITLE: Tell us about your business
ONBOARD.SUBTITLE: This lets your agent help your customers. You can change it later.
ONBOARD.TIP_COMPANY: The name your customers will see in the chat.
ONBOARD.DESC_PH: e.g. clothing and footwear for men and women
ONBOARD.TIP_DESC: Used to give your agent its personality.
ONBOARD.TIP_PERSONA: How the agent behaves and talks. Default: "You are Vecto, your company's virtual assistant".
ONBOARD.TIP_INFO: Info the agent uses to answer (shipping, payments, promos, policies). Contact goes separately.
ONBOARD.TIP_AGENDA: Paste your Cal.com link and an "Agendar" button opens the calendar inside the chat. With other systems, the bot shares the link.
ONBOARD.TIP_DOC: Link to a document (Word, web) with more business info. The agent reads it.
ONBOARD.TIP_INVENTORY: URL to your inventory as CSV/Google Sheet. Leave empty if you don't use CSV.
ONBOARD.TIP_COLOR: Color of the chat button and bubble. By default it adapts to your site's color.
ONBOARD.WELCOME_PH: Hi! 👋 How can I help you?
ONBOARD.TIP_QUICK: Suggestions shown when the chat opens.
ONBOARD.QUICK_UPGRADE: Your plan allows 3 buttons. Upgrade to Pro for more.
ONBOARD.TIP_ORIGINS: Sites where your chatbot can run (for security).
ONBOARD.ORIGINS_BIZ: Your Business plan allows 2 domains per chatbot.
ONBOARD.TIP_RULES: Extra rules for the agent, on top of the security ones.
ONBOARD.TIP_LANGUAGE: Automatic replies in the language of the customer's last message.
ONBOARD.TIP_PRIVACY: Leave empty to use Vectis' privacy policy.
ONBOARD.INTEGRATION_NOTE: Need a custom integration (databases, calendars or company documentation)? Leave those fields blank and create the chatbot without them. After creating it, contact us via "Technical Support" (left menu) and we'll connect it for you.
ONBOARD.MODERATION_NOTE: For safety, every configuration is reviewed automatically to prevent abuse or disallowed instructions. Accounts that attempt to manipulate the bot's behavior beyond the service limits may be suspended.
ONBOARD.TIP_HOURS: Toggle the days you're open and set the hours. If you're closed on a day, turn it off.
ONBOARD.E_SCHEDULE: Mark at least one day as open.
ONBOARD.E_FAQS: Add at least 3 questions with their answers.
ONBOARD.E_ORIGINS: Add at least one allowed domain.
ONBOARD.PERSONA_HINT: Pre-filled from your business name and what it does; edit it freely. Minimum 100 characters.
ONBOARD.INFO_HINT: Tell the assistant everything important about your business. Minimum 200 characters.
ONBOARD.FAQS_HINT: Add at least 3 frequently asked questions with their answers.
ONBOARD.RULES_HINT: State rules or restrictions for the assistant. Minimum 100 characters.
ONBOARD.TIP_LOGO: Public link to your logo image (PNG/JPG). It appears in the chat header.
ONBOARD.TIP_COLOR2: Secondary color for the widget gradient. Defaults to a dark tone.
ONBOARD.ORIGINS_ANY: If you leave it empty, any domain will be able to use the chatbot.
ONBOARD.TIP_POSITION: Which side the chat launcher circle appears on your site.
ONBOARD.TIP_KB_FILE: Upload a PDF or .txt with business info (catalog, policies, FAQs). The bot will use it to answer.
ONBOARD.KB_FILE_HINT: PDF or text, up to 10 MB. Text is extracted to train the bot.
ONBOARD.TIP_INV_FILE: Upload a CSV or Excel with your products/prices/stock. Alternative to pasting the sheet link.
ONBOARD.INV_FILE_HINT: CSV or Excel (.xlsx), up to 10 MB. Takes priority over the inventory link.
ONBOARD.E_FILE: Could not process the file. Try another one.
ONBOARD.E_FILE_EMPTY: No text found in the file.
ONBOARD.LOCKED_BY_FILE: You uploaded a file; remove it to use a URL again.
ONBOARD.LOCKED_BY_URL: A URL is set; clear it to upload a file.
ONBOARD.TIP_WEBSITE: The bot studies this page content to answer with more context.
ONBOARD.WEBSITE_HINT: E.g. your home or "about" page. It is read and cached; changes may take up to 1 hour to reflect.
ONBOARD.STUDY_OK: Done! The bot studied your site.
ONBOARD.STUDY_ERR: Could not study the site. Check the URL.
ONBOARD.STUDY_SAVE_FIRST: Save the chatbot first to study the site.
ONBOARD.TIP_CONTACT: The bot shares these when a customer asks how to reach the business.
ONBOARD.TIP_HANDOFF: Let a customer talk to a real person. Messages reach you on Telegram and you reply from there; the customer stays in the chat.
ONBOARD.TG_HINT: Connect your Telegram to receive live chats and reply.
ONBOARD.TG_CONNECTED: Telegram connected. You will receive live chats here.
ONBOARD.TG_SAVE_FIRST: Save your chatbot first to connect Telegram.
ONBOARD.TG_OPEN: If it did not open, use this link:

GUIDE.HOW_TITLE: This is how it works, and you are in control
GUIDE.HOW_SUB: Self-serve means you set it up from a simple panel, without depending on developers or on us. Configure, test and publish at your own pace.
GUIDE.TH1_D: It answers only with the information you give it. It does not make up or improvise data.
GUIDE.TH2_D: It follows safety rules: it never reveals internal data or strays from your business purpose.
GUIDE.TH3_D: It uses advanced AI with automatic backup: if one engine fails, it switches to another without the customer noticing.
GUIDE.S1_D: Sign up with email or Google and pick the plan that fits your business.
GUIDE.S2_D: Add your info: hours, contact, FAQs, documents, inventory and even your website. The bot learns only from that.
GUIDE.S3_D: Adjust colors, logo, title, welcome message, buttons and the bubble position. All without touching code.
GUIDE.S4_D: See a live preview of the chat while you configure it, and tweak it until it sounds like you.
GUIDE.S5_D: Copy a single line of code, paste it on your site, and the bubble appears instantly, helping 24/7.
GUIDE.FEAT_SUB: An assistant that learns from your business and adapts to how you work.
GUIDE.F1_D: Upload PDFs or text files, paste a Google Doc, and the bot learns and answers from that info.
GUIDE.F2_D: Connect your inventory via CSV, Google Sheets or Excel. It answers with real prices and stock, always up to date.
GUIDE.F3_D: Give it your site URL and the bot reads it, summarizes it and uses it to answer with more context.
GUIDE.F4_D: Share your Cal.com link (or another) so customers can book or schedule when it applies.
GUIDE.F5_D: Define your FAQs and the bot answers them instantly with your official answers.
GUIDE.F6_D: Colors, logo, title, welcome message, quick-reply buttons and bubble position — all from the panel.
GUIDE.F7_D: Detects interest and saves name and contact automatically, ready for follow-up (Pro & Business).
GUIDE.F8_D: Dashboard with conversations, messages, leads, satisfaction, trending topics and resolution rate.
GUIDE.F9_D: Detects the visitor language and answers in Spanish or English automatically.
GUIDE.TRUST_SUB: Your business trust comes first. Here is how we protect your data and your customers’ data.
GUIDE.T1_D: Each chatbot only accesses your business information. It never mixes with other customers’ data.
GUIDE.T2_D: All communication travels encrypted (HTTPS) and keys and credentials are stored protected, never exposed on the web.
GUIDE.T3_D: Your information is used only to answer your customers. It is never sold or used to train third-party AI.
GUIDE.T4_D: You decide what the bot sees, edit it whenever you want, and can delete your account and data at any time.
GUIDE.TRUST_NOTE: See the full details in our
GUIDE.Q1: Do I need to know how to code?
GUIDE.A1: No. Everything is set up from a no-code panel and installed by pasting one line of code on your site.
GUIDE.Q2: How does it learn about my business?
GUIDE.A2: You add info, FAQs, documents (PDF or Google Doc), inventory (CSV, Google Sheets or Excel) and even your website. It answers only from that info, without making things up.
GUIDE.Q3: Can it show real prices and stock?
GUIDE.A3: Yes. Connect your inventory and the bot answers with up-to-date prices and availability.
GUIDE.Q4: Does it integrate with Cal.com for booking?
GUIDE.A4: Yes. Add your Cal.com link (or another) and the bot shares it so customers can book or schedule.
GUIDE.A5: Yes: colors, logo, title, welcome message, buttons and bubble position, all from the panel.
GUIDE.Q6: What languages does it answer in?
GUIDE.A6: It detects the visitor language and answers in Spanish or English automatically.
GUIDE.A7: Yes. Each business has isolated data, communication is encrypted, and your information is not used to train third-party AI. You decide what the bot sees and can delete everything whenever you want.
GUIDE.A8: No. Change plan or cancel whenever you want.
GUIDE.F10_D: When the bot is not enough, the customer taps "Talk to an agent" and their messages reach your Telegram; you reply from there and it shows in the same chat, without the customer switching apps. They can return to the assistant anytime, and those messages don't use AI. Today via Telegram; more channels coming soon.
GUIDE.Q9: Can the bot hand the conversation to a person?
GUIDE.A9: Yes. With human handoff, the customer taps "Talk to an agent" and from then on their messages no longer go to the AI but to your Telegram. You reply from your phone or computer and your answer appears instantly in the same customer chat; they never leave your site. When done, they can return to the assistant with a button. Benefits: it is live and two-way, it doesn't use AI credits while they talk to you, and it is set up by pasting your Telegram bot token. The channel is Telegram for now, with more coming soon (WhatsApp, Slack and others).

DEMO.TITLE: See it working
DEMO.SUB: This is what your customers see, and how you manage it. All with the real Vectis design.
DEMO.CHAT_D: The same bubble they will see on your site: it answers questions, recommends, negotiates and even collects the customer’s details to book a meeting.
DEMO.TOUR_T: Your panel, from setup to metrics
DEMO.TOUR_D: Set up your bot with no code and watch your Pro plan metrics in real time: conversations, messages, leads, satisfaction and the conversations happening right now.

HANDOFF.TITLE: Human handoff
HANDOFF.LEAD: Let a customer talk to a real person. Their messages reach you on Telegram —each customer in its own Topic— and you reply from there; the customer stays in the same chat.
HANDOFF.HOW1: The customer taps "Talk to a person" in the chat.
HANDOFF.HOW2: Their messages reach you on Telegram, each customer in its own Topic (thread).
HANDOFF.HOW3: You reply from Telegram and your answer appears in the customer chat.
HANDOFF.HOW4: The customer can go back to the assistant anytime.
HANDOFF.G1: In Telegram, open @BotFather and send /newbot. Pick a name and a username ending in "bot". Copy the token it gives you.
HANDOFF.G2: In @BotFather send /setprivacy, choose your bot and turn OFF "Group Privacy" (leave it "disabled"). Since the bot is a group admin it will see all messages anyway, but this makes sure.
HANDOFF.G3: Create a Telegram group and enable "Topics" (group settings → Topics).
HANDOFF.G4: Add your bot to the group as an admin, with permission to manage Topics.
HANDOFF.F_USER_HINT: Auto-filled on save; only fill it if you know it.
HANDOFF.STATUS_LINKED: Telegram linked. You now receive live chats.
HANDOFF.STATUS_PENDING: One step left: in your Telegram group send /start to link it.
HANDOFF.G5: Paste the token below and save: we register your bot automatically.
HANDOFF.G6: In the GROUP (not the bot private chat) send /start to link it. If you already did /start in the private chat, do it again inside the group to switch the destination. Each conversation lands in its own Topic.

REFUNDS.META_DESC: Learn how we handle payments, cancellations and refunds for Vectis Automation Group's AI ChatBot subscriptions.
REFUNDS.TITLE: Refund Policy
REFUNDS.INTRO: This Refund Policy explains how we handle payments, cancellations and refunds for subscriptions to Vectis Automation Group's AI ChatBot product. It forms part of our Terms and Conditions.

S1.B: The AI ChatBot is billed in advance through a monthly subscription based on the chosen plan (Basic, Pro or Business). Each payment enables the service for the corresponding period.

S2.B: You can cancel your subscription whenever you want from your account or by contacting us. Cancellation stops future renewals; your chatbot stays active until the end of the period already paid for and no additional charges are made.

S3.B: If it is your first subscription to a plan, you may request a full refund within the first 7 calendar days from the first payment if the service does not meet your expectations. This guarantee applies once per customer.

S4.B: Outside the guarantee period, payments for a period that has already started are not refunded on a prorated basis. When you cancel, you keep access until the end of the current period.

S5.B: You can upgrade or downgrade your plan whenever you want. When you upgrade, the new price applies immediately and the current period is prorated when possible. When you downgrade, the change applies from the next period.

S6.B: We may deny refunds in cases of abusive use of the service, breach of the Terms and Conditions, or when fraud is detected. Charges for setup or custom integration services contracted separately are non-refundable once delivered.

S7.B: Email us at contact@wearevectis.com from the address associated with your account, stating the reason for your request. We will respond within 5 business days and, if applicable, the refund will be issued to the same payment method within a reasonable time depending on your provider.

S8.B: We may update this policy from time to time. We will publish the current version on this page along with its update date.

REFUNDS.CONTACT_LINE: If you have questions about refunds or your subscription, email us at
